hero.headline: Catering for Your Most Memorable Moments

about.label: Our Story
about.headline: Rooted in Ancient Tradition
about.p1: Los Secretos Del Sur is a catering project rooted in the culinary traditions of the Yucatán peninsula — a cuisine born from the ancient Maya civilization and carried through generations. From the sacred B'en glyph that marks our identity to the flavors that define our menus, everything we do is an expression of cultural pride brought to your table.
about.p2: From Yucatán to Amarillo, Texas — Martha Cabrera founded Los Secretos Del Sur with one mission: to bring authentic Yucatecan flavors to the events that matter most. Every display, every bar, every detail is crafted with the elegance and warmth that only a deep cultural connection can produce.
about.symbolText: Our logo is the Maya B'en glyph — meaning Junco, the Reed. In the Maya Tzolkin calendar, B'en represents the growth of grain and abundance. It is the foundation of our identity.

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Catering for Every Occasion
services.subheadline: From intimate family gatherings to grand wedding receptions — Los Secretos Del Sur brings authentic Yucatecan flavor to your most important moments.
services.card1Text: Make your wedding reception unforgettable with our elegant charcuterie and appetizer displays, curated food bars, and handcrafted beverage service.
services.card2Text: Quinceañeras, family reunions, milestone celebrations — we bring warmth, flavor, and elegance to every family gathering.
services.card3Text: Elevate your birthday celebration with a curated food experience that your guests will talk about long after the candles are blown out.
services.card4Text: Corporate events, team celebrations, and professional gatherings — we make your office event feel like anything but ordinary.

menu.label: What's on the Table
menu.headline: Curated Menus for Every Event
menu.brunchText: A delicate and versatile experience to enjoy mid-morning or early afternoon, featuring a selection of fresh and delicious flavors in a relaxed setting.
menu.foodBarsText: Small bites designed for big moments. Choose from our four curated food bars, each created to offer a variety of flavors and a beautiful presentation.
menu.bar1Text: A fresh and casual option featuring salads, pasta dishes, and assorted pizzas. Perfect for guests to serve themselves and enjoy a variety of flavors.
menu.bar2Text: Small, flavorful Spanish-style bites including tapas and pinchos — perfect for mingling and enjoying throughout the event.
menu.bar3Text: A beautifully styled table with assorted cheeses, cured meats, fresh fruits, crackers, nuts, and savory appetizers.
menu.bar4Text: A diverse selection of savory bites including mini sandwiches, snacks, tapas, charcuterie cups, and appetizers in an elegant display.
menu.beverageText: Elevate your event with our beverage bar, offering refreshing handcrafted cocktails or sangrias — the perfect complement to celebrate memorable moments with your guests.
menu.complimentaryText: Complimentary for wedding receptions: A traditional Mexican Café de Olla station — as our gift to you and your guests.

whyus.label: Why Los Secretos Del Sur
whyus.headline: More Than Catering
whyus.card1Text: Every dish and display is inspired by the rich culinary traditions of the Yucatán peninsula, rooted in ancient Maya culture and brought to life with modern elegance.
whyus.card2Text: We handle everything — table setup, elegant presentation, serving boards, utensils, display pieces, table maintenance for 2 hours, and two full refills to keep your guests satisfied.
whyus.card3Text: Small details, unforgettable experiences. We design snack bars and curated selections that blend elegance and flavor, making your event truly memorable.

testimonials.label: What Clients Say
testimonials.headline: Unforgettable Moments

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.headline: Let's Plan Your Event
contact.subheadline: Ready to make your event unforgettable? Fill out the form below or call Martha directly. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.locationLine1: Serving Amarillo & surrounding West Texas area
contact.successText: Thank you for reaching out. Martha will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.bookingNote: 50% deposit required to secure your date. Remaining balance due one day before event.
